response.justification: Technically excellent with mastery of all required skills, but vastly overqualified as a Staff Engineer applying for a junior/mid-level role. This creates a severe organizational mismatch: high flight risk, predictable compensation misalignment, and likely frustration with the scope of work. Better candidates exist at the appropriate experience level.
strengths: Mastery of core stack: TypeScript, React, Node.js, relational databases, clean architecture and REST APIs
Demonstrated commitment to software craftsmanship through TDD practices, multiple open-source projects, and mentoring
Proven ability to deliver across full stack and multiple industries, from startups to established companies
concerns: Staff Engineer applying for entry/junior role—represents significant step down with high flight risk
Current role involves AI infrastructure and senior responsibilities; stepping back to basic fullstack work is career regression
Compensation expectations and career progression needs will likely be misaligned with junior-level offerings
